source_jobs.title: Gradient Ascent Program 🚀
source_jobs.description:
[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/4077ce61-7f14-4f8f-ac41-75de8e0dfcda/2791750157249_.pic.jpg]



Gradient is building the world’s first fully AI runtime—a sovereign, peer-powered infrastructure where intelligence is hosted, served, and owned by the people. The age of Centralized Intelligence is ending. What comes next is open, agentic, and alive at the edge.



We’ve recently completed our $10M seed funding round, led by Pantera Capital and Multicoin Capital, with participation from HSG (formerly Sequoia Capital China) and other distinguished partners. This milestone is further supported by leading angel investors and advisors from spaces across AI, crypto, and beyond.



🌟 Gradient Ascent Program: Your Gateway to Innovation 🚀

Are you a tech enthusiast with a vision for the future? The Gradient Ascent Program connects curious, driven, and talented students with an exciting startup experience. Join Gradient Network to push the boundaries of technology, work on impactful projects, and explore the fast-paced, creative world where ideas come to life. ⚡



Why Join Gradient Network?

At Gradient Network, we’re not just building products — we’re shaping the future of open, intelligent infrastructure. 🧠 This is your chance to be part of a team that thrives on fresh ideas and innovation. As a participant, you’ll gain firsthand exposure to a fast-evolving industry and the freedom to unleash your creativity. 💡



What’s in It for You?

✨ Real Projects, Real Impact: Work on meaningful initiatives that influence real-world tech.

🤝 Collaborate with Innovators: Join a team of forward-thinkers who value your ideas.

🧑‍🏫 Mentorship & Growth: Learn from experienced professionals who’ll help you hone your skills.

🎨 Room to Innovate: Explore your ideas in a space that values agility and experimentation.



What You’ll Work On:

👨‍💻 Frontend Development: Build interactive, user-friendly interfaces with React and Next.js

🛠️ Backend Engineering: Create robust systems using Java or Python

☁️ AI Infrastructure: Develop infrastructure tools and services using Go

🖥️ AI Platform Services: Design and prototype platform functionality using C++



Who Should Apply?

If you’re passionate about tech, eager to learn, and ready for the thrill of startup life — we want to hear from you. We’re looking for students who are curious, ambitious, and excited to make a real impact. 🔥



Why It’s Worth It:

🚀 Feel the Startup Pulse: Experience how bold ideas turn into real systems

🔎 Fresh Perspectives for Your Career: Gain clarity and direction for your future

⚡ Creative Energy: Work in a team that values experimentation and original thinking



Ready to Dive In?

If you’re excited to challenge yourself and work on cutting-edge technology, submit your resume and a short message about your passion for innovation. Let’s build something amazing together. ✨



Plug into innovation. Join the Gradient Ascent Program and start building your future. 🌌



If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and be part of a transformative journey, we invite you to apply. Together, let’s build a brighter, more inclusive future powered by intelligence.

We’re excited about the path we’re forging — and the talented minds who will help shape it. If you’re passionate about building a community-driven future for AI and eager to make a lasting impact, we’d love to hear from you.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/428df060-cfe0-484e-b82a-e3e9c68337e6/image.png]



📩 For recruitment-related inquiries only:

✈️ Telegram: @GradientHR https://t.me/GradientHR

📧 Email: cv@gradient.network



🔗Gradient Official:

Website https://www.gradient.network/ | X https://twitter.com/Gradient_HQ | Discord https://discord.gg/gradientnetwork

source_jobs.title: Growth & BD
source_jobs.description:
[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/4077ce61-7f14-4f8f-ac41-75de8e0dfcda/2791750157249_.pic.jpg]



Gradient is building the world’s first fully AI runtime—a sovereign, peer-powered infrastructure where intelligence is hosted, served, and owned by the people. The age of Centralized Intelligence is ending. What comes next is open, agentic, and alive at the edge.



We’ve recently completed our $10M seed funding round, led by Pantera Capital and Multicoin Capital, with participation from HSG (formerly Sequoia Capital China) and other distinguished partners. This milestone is further supported by leading angel investors and advisors from spaces across AI, crypto, and beyond.



About the Role

We are looking for a driven, dynamic, and proactive Growth & BD to support our mission of building the world’s first fully decentralized AI runtime. This role is designed for someone eager to engage with cutting-edge AI infrastructure, facilitate meaningful partnerships, and drive the widespread adoption of decentralized intelligence technologies.



Responsibilities

 - Identify, research, and engage potential strategic partners, including research institutions, infrastructure platforms, developers, and tech communities.

 - Support senior BD team members in structuring and managing strategic partnerships and collaborations.

 - Contribute to creating scalable processes and resources (e.g., decks, proposals, and documentation) to enhance partner outreach effectiveness.

 - Help organize and participate in events, webinars, and community activities to boost Gradient Network's presence and awareness.

 - Work closely with Product and Marketing teams to align partnership initiatives with strategic business objectives.
   
   

Requirements

 - 1–3 years of experience in Business Development, Partnerships, Growth, or related roles.

 - Exceptional communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.

 - Proactive mindset, eager to learn and able to quickly grasp complex technical concepts related to AI and decentralized technologies.

 - Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.

 - Bonus: Previous experience or demonstrated interest in decentralized networks, AI infrastructure, blockchain, or similar tech ecosystems.



If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and be part of a transformative journey, we invite you to apply. Together, let’s build a brighter, more inclusive future powered by intelligence.

We’re excited about the path we’re forging — and the talented minds who will help shape it. If you’re passionate about building a community-driven future for AI and eager to make a lasting impact, we’d love to hear from you.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/428df060-cfe0-484e-b82a-e3e9c68337e6/image.png]



📩 For recruitment-related inquiries only:

✈️ Telegram: @GradientHR https://t.me/GradientHR

📧 Email: cv@gradient.network



🔗Gradient Official:

Website https://www.gradient.network/ | X https://twitter.com/Gradient_HQ | Discord https://discord.gg/gradientnetwork

source_jobs.title: AI Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/4077ce61-7f14-4f8f-ac41-75de8e0dfcda/2791750157249_.pic.jpg]



Gradient is building the world’s first fully AI runtime—a sovereign, peer-powered infrastructure where intelligence is hosted, served, and owned by the people. The age of Centralized Intelligence is ending. What comes next is open, agentic, and alive at the edge.



We’ve recently completed our $10M seed funding round, led by Pantera Capital and Multicoin Capital, with participation from HSG (formerly Sequoia Capital China) and other distinguished partners. This milestone is further supported by leading angel investors and advisors from spaces across AI, crypto, and beyond.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Research Engineer who’s passionate about shaping the future of AI infrastructure. In this role, you’ll work at the intersection of advanced machine learning models, distributed systems, and on-chain coordination — helping to build a more open, equitable, and resilient intelligence layer for the world.

You’ll join a team of deep technologists exploring how foundation models and intelligent systems can be deployed, trained, and served in environments — while maintaining performance, privacy, and security.



Responsibilities

 - Design and implement protocols for AI training and inference (e.g. federated learning, distributed fine-tuning, secure model serving)

 - Build scalable systems to support AI workloads across heterogeneous networks and devices

 - Contribute to architectural decisions, performance optimization, and reliability engineering

 - Collaborate with researchers and system engineers to translate novel ideas into real-world systems

 - Stay current with the latest advancements in AI, distributed infrastructure, and cryptographic mechanisms



Requirements

 - Strong programming skills in Python, Rust, or Go

 - Experience with AI/ML model training and serving pipelines (e.g. PyTorch, JAX, TensorFlow)

 - Solid foundation in distributed systems, networking, or applied cryptography

 - Familiarity with concepts like federated learning, secure aggregation, or verifiable intelligence

 - Bonus: experience working with blockchain protocols, zkML, or decentralized networks



If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and be part of a transformative journey, we invite you to apply. Together, let’s build a brighter, more inclusive future powered by intelligence.

We’re excited about the path we’re forging — and the talented minds who will help shape it. If you’re passionate about building a community-driven future for AI and eager to make a lasting impact, we’d love to hear from you.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/428df060-cfe0-484e-b82a-e3e9c68337e6/image.png]



📩 For recruitment-related inquiries only:

✈️ Telegram: @GradientHR https://t.me/GradientHR

📧 Email: cv@gradient.network



🔗Gradient Official:

Website https://www.gradient.network/ | X https://twitter.com/Gradient_HQ | Discord https://discord.gg/gradientnetwork

source_jobs.title: AI Researcher
source_jobs.description:
[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/4077ce61-7f14-4f8f-ac41-75de8e0dfcda/2791750157249_.pic.jpg]



Gradient is building the world’s first fully AI runtime—a sovereign, peer-powered infrastructure where intelligence is hosted, served, and owned by the people. The age of Centralized Intelligence is ending. What comes next is open, agentic, and alive at the edge.



We’ve recently completed our $10M seed funding round, led by Pantera Capital and Multicoin Capital, with participation from HSG (formerly Sequoia Capital China) and other distinguished partners. This milestone is further supported by leading angel investors and advisors from spaces across AI, crypto, and beyond.



About the Role

Gradient Network is looking for a Researcher with a strong foundation in machine learning, systems, or cryptography to help reimagine how intelligence is created and shared in world.

You’ll investigate the core scientific challenges of AI — such as distributed training, model integrity, incentive design, and privacy-preserving intelligence — and work alongside engineers to bring these breakthroughs into production.

This role is ideal for someone who thrives in ambiguity, prototypes fast, and wants their work to shape the trajectory of next-gen AI infrastructure.



Responsibilities

• Conduct original research on learning, distributed inference, and trustless collaboration in AI systems

• Contribute to the design of incentive mechanisms that support open and community-driven AI networks

• Prototype experimental systems and communicate findings internally and externally

• Translate theoretical insights into practical designs with engineering collaborators

• Engage with the global research community in AI, ML systems, and applied cryptography



Requirements

• Background in computer science, machine learning, applied mathematics, or a related field

• Demonstrated research experience in distributed ML, secure computation, federated learning, or incentive systems

• Ability to write clear technical documentation and communicate complex ideas effectively

• Bonus: experience with protocols, zero-knowledge proof systems, or system-level AI optimization



If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and be part of a transformative journey, we invite you to apply. Together, let’s build a brighter, more inclusive future powered by intelligence.

We’re excited about the path we’re forging — and the talented minds who will help shape it. If you’re passionate about building a community-driven future for AI and eager to make a lasting impact, we’d love to hear from you.



[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/428df060-cfe0-484e-b82a-e3e9c68337e6/image.png]



📩 For recruitment-related inquiries only:

✈️ Telegram: @GradientHR https://t.me/GradientHR

📧 Email: cv@gradient.network



🔗Gradient Official:

Website https://www.gradient.network/ | X https://twitter.com/Gradient_HQ | Discord https://discord.gg/gradientnetwork

source_jobs.description:
[https://app.ashbyhq.com/api/images/user-content/757c3ef5-0687-4136-a2f9-2f9316fea6f4/4077ce61-7f14-4f8f-ac41-75de8e0dfcda/2791750157249_.pic.jpg]



Gradient is building the world’s first fully AI runtime—a sovereign, peer-powered infrastructure where intelligence is hosted, served, and owned by the people. The age of Centralized Intelligence is ending. What comes next is open, agentic, and alive at the edge.



We’ve recently completed our $10M seed funding round, led by Pantera Capital and Multicoin Capital, with participation from HSG (formerly Sequoia Capital China) and other distinguished partners. This milestone is further supported by leading angel investors and advisors from spaces across AI, crypto, and beyond.



About the Role



We’re seeking a strategic and hands-on Business Development Lead to identify and grow high-leverage partnerships that accelerate the adoption of next-generation intelligence systems.

You’ll play a key role in shaping how Gradient interfaces with external collaborators — from research institutions to infrastructure platforms and technology partners.



Responsibilities



• Lead outreach and deal-making with aligned partners and collaborators

• Structure partnerships that support product direction and community growth

• Design systems and materials for scalable, repeatable BD efforts

• Represent Gradient in external conversations and industry forums

• Collaborate closely with product and marketing to align strategic goals



Requirements



• 3–7 years of experience in BD, strategic partnerships, or similar roles

• Strong communication and negotiation skills

• Deep curiosity about AI infrastructure and long-term innovation

• Bonus: experience working across complex stakeholder groups or technical ecosystems



If you’re ready to challenge the status quo and be part of a transformative journey, we invite you to apply. Together, let’s build a brighter, more inclusive future powered by intelligence.

We’re excited about the path we’re forging — and the talented minds who will help shape it. If you’re passionate about building a community-driven future for AI and eager to make a lasting impact, we’d love to hear from you.
